Localization.Description: Attempt to attach a routing table to a subnet or detach it from a subnet

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is detaching routing table {datafield5} from subnet "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to detach routing table {datafield5} from subnet "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is attaching routing table {datafield5} to subnet "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} detached routing table {datafield5} from subnet "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} attached routing table {datafield5} to subnet "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to attach routing table {datafield5} to subnet "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
